summary: Completed comprehensive testing of ERP V3 features. All 20 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend testing verified all V3 features: Dashboard with Recharts analytics (Line/Bar/Pie charts), Profit Center filter (location dropdown + 7d/30d/90d periods), Tax & Compliance settings (toggle, VAT 18%, SSCL 2.5%), Product Attributes (Color, Batch), 6 migrations displayed, Shift Reconciliation with outlet selector, and Users page with location assignment dropdown.

integration_issues.issue: No products displayed in POS - expected behavior as products need inventory at outlet locations
integration_issues.note: This is expected behavior - products need inventory to be sold at outlets

passed_tests: Login with admin@erp.com/admin123 - PASSED
Dashboard loads with Recharts charts (3 charts: Line, Bar, Pie) - PASSED
Dashboard Profit Center filter (location dropdown with 11 options) - PASSED
Dashboard period buttons (7d, 30d, 90d) - PASSED
GET /api/tax-settings returns default {tax_active:false, vat_rate:18, sscl_rate:2.5} - PASSED
PUT /api/tax-settings updates tax settings - PASSED
GET /api/product-attributes returns Color and Batch - PASSED
POST /api/product-attributes creates new attribute - PASSED
GET /api/product-variants returns variants list - PASSED
POST /api/product-variants creates a variant with attributes - PASSED
GET /api/dashboard/analytics returns trend data, payment_methods, top_products - PASSED
GET /api/dashboard/analytics with 7d period returns 7 days of data - PASSED
GET /api/dashboard/analytics with 30d period returns 30 days of data - PASSED
GET /api/dashboard/analytics with location filter - PASSED
GET /api/shifts returns shift list - PASSED
POST /api/shifts/open opens a shift with opening float - PASSED
GET /api/shifts/current/{location_id} returns live shift data - PASSED
POST /api/shifts/{shift_id}/close closes shift with discrepancy calculation - PASSED
POST /api/petty-cash creates petty cash entry - PASSED
GET /api/petty-cash returns petty cash list - PASSED
GET /api/migrations/status returns 6 applied migrations (001-006) - PASSED
GET /api/locations returns locations with types (factory, warehouse, outlet) - PASSED
GET /api/users returns users with location_id field - PASSED
Settings page shows Tax toggle, VAT/SSCL rates - PASSED
Settings page shows Product Attributes (Batch, Color) - PASSED
Settings page shows 6 Migration entries - PASSED
Users page shows location assignment dropdown - PASSED
Reconciliation page loads with outlet selector - PASSED
Reconciliation page shows shift management (Open Shift button) - PASSED
POS page loads with search and barcode inputs - PASSED
context_for_next_testing_agent: V3 ERP features fully tested and working: Tax settings (VAT 18%, SSCL 2.5%), Product attributes/variants, Dashboard analytics with Recharts, Shift reconciliation, Petty cash, 6 migrations applied. All backend APIs working. Frontend pages (Dashboard, Settings, Users, Reconciliation, POS) all functional.

v3_features_verified.dynamic_product_attributes_variants: Color and Batch attributes, variant creation working
v3_features_verified.shift_reconciliation_petty_cash: shift open/close, petty cash CRUD working
v3_features_verified.recharts_dashboard_analytics: Line chart (Sales Trend), Pie chart (Payment Methods), Bar chart (Top Products)
